stemHtml: A flight is to depart from an airport with runways 09 and 27. Surface wind is 270/05. An inversion is reported at 300 feet with turbulence and wind shear. The wind just above the inversion is 090/30. What is the safest departure procedure?

options.a: Take-off is not possible under these conditions.
options.b: Depart runway 27 with maximum rate of climb possible.
options.d: Depart runway 27 with maximum throttle during the passage through the inversion.
